name: thor-platform
description: Digitaal Platform Toezicht & Handhaving - Gemeente Amsterdam

scripts.dev: docker compose up -d postgres && concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:backoffice"
scripts.dev:api: cd packages/api && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:backoffice
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/api && npx prisma migrate dev
